name: corporate-development-ma
description: Corporate Development & M&A team — 3 agents (corpdev-lead, ma-diligence-lead, integration-pmi-strategist), 4 skills, 4 commands, 1 advisory hook, 7 best-practice rules, and a 3-file research-grounded knowledge bank. A buy-side deal team for a corp-dev, strategy, or finance lead: it frames the deal thesis before the model, triangulates valuation (DCF + trading comps + precedent transactions), runs diligence to confirm or kill the thesis, and prices integration risk pre-signing. Decision-support, not legal, tax, accounting, or a fairness opinion; multiples/comps/regulatory specifics are volatile + jurisdictional, retrieval-dated + verify-at-use; no MNPI. Distinct from startup-fundraising, finance, and treasury-management. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
